target_en: I fell comfortably asleep, and ended up staying overnight.
Was that just because I was tired,
or did someone put a drug in my food?
It's not like me to fall straight into a deep sleep and spend a night at grandma's house.
I wanted to forget about what happened in that eerie storehouse, so I got a little carried away.
But it feels like more than a coincidence.
Now that I think about it...... I did have a reason to kill grandma.
Do you know what it was?
...It wasn't just because she killed Satoshi-kun.
You aren't even sure if the old lady actually trusted you.
But... I don't know if she forgave Satoshi-kun because of what I did.
She wouldn't have told you the truth.\"
